steps.name: implementation
steps.acceptance: Output-shift mode added to src/model.py and src/train.py. All unit tests pass: output shift zeros, self-inclusive causal mask, no SOS in sequence, forward-inverse consistency, backward compatibility, zero-init, Jacobian triangularity.

steps.name: diagnostic
steps.acceptance: 500-step diagnostic on ethanol with output-shift. log_det/dof < 5.0 at step 500 confirms hypothesis.

result.assessment: PROMISING — model learning, budget insufficient at 1k steps

steps.name: angle_sanity_sweep
steps.reason: SANITY val promising but below criterion — no free parameters to sweep in SANITY. Proceed to HEURISTICS.

steps.name: angle_sanity_full
steps.reason: SANITY val below criterion (13.8% vs 40% target) — HEURISTICS angle attempted per OPTIMIZE priority order.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_val
steps.acceptance: Validation run with SBG training recipe.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_sweep
steps.acceptance: W&B sweep over lr configs completed; best config selected.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_full
steps.reason: Best sweep config (HEUR C) also failed criterion (24.8% vs 40%). VF plateau pattern across all configs indicates fundamental limitation, not a sweep optimization issue. Proceeding to SCALE.

steps.name: angle_scale_val
steps.acceptance: Validation run with d_model=256, n_blocks=12. Promising if VF > 0.25 on ethanol.

result.config: d_model=256, n_blocks=12, 9.6M params, lr=5e-4, cosine, 5000 steps
result.assessment: Larger model overfits (val loss diverges after step 1000). Same or WORSE than HEURISTICS.

steps.name: angle_scale_sweep
steps.reason: SCALE val promising criterion NOT MET (16.2% vs 25% threshold). Larger model overfits. SCALE angle FAILS.

steps.name: final_report
steps.acceptance: Final Experiment Report written to reports/final_report.md.

result.primary_result: Hypothesis CONFIRMED (log_det/dof bounded 0.5-1.3 vs 7+ for SOS). VF criterion not met.
result.best_config: HEURISTICS C (lr=1e-3, cosine, 5k steps): ethanol VF=24.8%

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; src/ reflects current practice.
steps.result: N/A — all new code already in src/model.py and src/train.py. No experiment-level .py scripts created.

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_006; pre-merge checks pass.
